description: Replace the fixed 6-day Push/Pull/Legs split (Models/TrainingProgramData.swift) with a user-defined custom training program. Users can: (a) pick a starting template from the gallery (current PPL, Upper/Lower, Full-body 3x/week, Bro split), (b) edit days (rename / change DayType / reorder), (c) add/remove/reorder exercises within each day from the catalog (depends on C3 read-only library), (d) save multiple programs and switch between them. Existing users keep current PPL until they explicitly create or import a different program — migration is implicit, not destructive. Closes backlog L348 (RICE 7.0, 4-6d Feature 9-phase — LARGEST in tier C carryover).
backlog_source: docs/product/backlog.md L348 + Planned RICE row 7.0 + 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan C6

dependencies_met.Import_Training_Plan_Phase_1: shipped 2026-05-06 PR #234 — persistence + active-plan switching + CSV/JSON/Markdown parsers + 87-exercise mapper
dependencies_met.TrainingProgramStore: shipped (DataStore) — owns the active program slot
dependencies_met.ImportedPlansListScreen: shipped (Views/Settings/v2/Screens/) — sibling pattern for program list management

dependencies_gated_on.C3_exercise_search_filter: in flight 2026-06-01 PR #573 — C6 'add exercise' picker reuses the C3 library sheet for browsing

scope_decision_tree_at_phase_0.data_model: Per-user `[CustomProgram]` array in dataStore; each program has [Day], each Day has [ExerciseSlot] with exercise_id reference + override-able sets/reps/rest fields
scope_decision_tree_at_phase_0.migration: Existing users see fixed PPL until they tap 'Customize program' in Settings. First customization snapshots current PPL as 'My Program (was Default PPL)' editable copy.
scope_decision_tree_at_phase_0.templates: 4 starter templates: (1) PPL 6-day current default; (2) Upper/Lower 4-day; (3) Full-body 3-day; (4) Empty (build from scratch)
scope_decision_tree_at_phase_0.scope_v1: ADD/REMOVE/REORDER exercises within days. RENAME day labels. Change DayType assignment. SAVE multiple programs.
scope_decision_tree_at_phase_0.scope_v1_NOT: Per-day target progression curves. Periodization phase blocks. AI-suggested replacements. Shared community programs. Mid-week swap warnings.

transitions.reason: C6 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (RICE 7.0, LARGEST). Operator directive: 'continue c3,c6,e4,d1 in sequence'. Phase 0 research draft only — scope is 4-6d Feature 9-phase, can't realistically full-ship in one continuation alongside C3+E4+D1.
